Ser
Gunthor Hightower
Gunthor Hightower by Laura Avellino
Titles
  • Novice (formerly)
  • Ser[1]
Allegiance House Hightower
Culture Reach
Born ~271–285 AC[2]
Oldtown[3]
Father Leyton Hightower
Spouse Jeyne Fossoway[4]
Books
  • A Feast for Crows (appears)
  • The Winds of Winter (mentioned)

Gunthor Hightower is a knight of House Hightower. He is the third son of Lord Leyton Hightower and is married to Jeyne Fossoway.[4]

Contents

  • 1 Appearance and Character
  • 2 History
  • 3 Recent Events
    • 3.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 4 Family
  • 5 References

Appearance and Character[ ]

Gunthor owns a cloth-of-silver cloak and a suit of grey enameled scales.[1]

History[ ]

Ser Gunthor studied at the Citadel for several years, during which time he learned to speak the Summer Tongue.[1]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

After the ironborn attack on the Reach, Ser Gunthor is given command of the harbor at Oldtown, and prepares its defenses.[1]

Approaching Oldtown, the Cinnamon Wind is inspected in Whispering Sound by the captain of the Huntress, and then inspected a second time in the harbor of Oldtown by Gunthor himself. Because Gunthor knows the Summer Tongue, he and Captain Quhuru Mo speak privately in his cabin for a while. Afterwards, Gunthor orders the harbor's chain boom to be opened so the swan ship can dock.[1]
